post.description: Register a new student account and dispatch an email-verification link.

schema.title: Response Register Api V1 Auth Register Post

post.description: Re-send the email-verification link for an unverified account.

schema.title: Response Resend Verification Api V1 Auth Resend Verification Post

get.description: Mark the email address associated with a signed token as verified.

schema.title: Response Verify Email Api V1 Auth Verify Email  Token  Get

post.description: Authenticate with email and password, returning an access token and setting a refresh-token cookie.

schema.title: Response Login Api V1 Auth Login Post

post.description: Rotate the refresh-token cookie and issue a new short-lived access token.

schema.title: Response Refresh Api V1 Auth Refresh Post

post.description: Revoke the current refresh-token session and delete the cookie.
Dispatch a password-reset email if the address belongs to a registered account.

schema.title: Response Forgot Password Api V1 Auth Forgot Password Post

post.description: Apply a new password using a signed, 1-hour reset token and revoke all sessions.

schema.title: Response Reset Password Api V1 Auth Reset Password  Token  Post

get.description: Redirect the browser to Google's OAuth consent screen.
Handle the Google OAuth callback: exchange the code for tokens and return application credentials.

schema.title: Response Google Callback Api V1 Auth Google Callback Get

get.description: Return the authenticated user's full profile.

schema.title: Response Get Me Api V1 Users Me Get

patch.description: Partially update the authenticated user's profile fields.

schema.title: Response Update Me Api V1 Users Me Patch

get.description: List all active sessions for the authenticated user.

schema.title: Response List Sessions Api V1 Users Me Sessions Get

delete.description: Revoke a specific session by ID, preventing further token refreshes from it.

get.description: List all users with pagination metadata.

schema.title: Response List Users Api V1 Admin Users Get

patch.description: Change the role of a user.

schema.title: Response Update User Role Api V1 Admin Users  User Id  Role Patch

post.description: Create a new course in draft status.

schema.title: Response Create Course Api V1 Admin Courses Post

patch.description: Update course metadata or status, subject to valid status transitions.

schema.title: Response Update Course Api V1 Admin Courses  Course Id  Patch

delete.description: Archive a course, removing it from public listings.

post.description: Append a new chapter to a course, auto-assigning the next position.

schema.title: Response Create Chapter Api V1 Admin Courses  Course Id  Chapters Post
Response Update Chapter Api V1 Admin Chapters  Chapter Id  Patch

delete.description: Delete a chapter and all its lessons.

patch.description: Reorder a course's chapters by supplying the complete ordered list of chapter IDs.

schema.title: Response Reorder Chapters Api V1 Admin Courses  Course Id  Chapters Reorder Patch

post.description: Append a new lesson to a chapter, auto-assigning the next position.

schema.title: Response Create Lesson Api V1 Admin Chapters  Chapter Id  Lessons Post

patch.description: Partially update a lesson's content or metadata.

schema.title: Response Update Lesson Api V1 Admin Lessons  Lesson Id  Patch

delete.description: Delete a lesson and its attached resources.

patch.description: Reorder a chapter's lessons by supplying the complete ordered list of lesson IDs.

schema.title: Response Reorder Lessons Api V1 Admin Chapters  Chapter Id  Lessons Reorder Patch

post.description: Attach a downloadable resource file to a lesson.

post.description: Create an assignment on a lesson.

schema.title: Response Create Assignment Api V1 Admin Assignments Post

get.description: List all course categories ordered alphabetically.

schema.title: Response List Categories Api V1 Categories Get

get.description: List published courses with optional category, level, and price filters.

schema.title: Response List Courses Api V1 Courses Get

get.description: Fetch the full course detail tree (chapters, lessons, resources) by slug.

schema.title: Response Get Course Api V1 Courses  Slug  Get

get.description: Full-text search over published courses, ranked by relevance.

schema.title: Response Search Api V1 Search Get

post.description: Enroll the authenticated student in a free published course.

schema.title: Response Enroll Api V1 Courses  Course Id  Enroll Post

delete.description: Unenroll the authenticated student from a course (soft-delete).

schema.title: Response Unenroll Api V1 Enrollments  Enrollment Id  Delete

get.description: List all enrollments for the authenticated student, ordered by most recent.

schema.title: Response List Enrollments Api V1 Users Me Enrollments Get

post.description:
Save or advance lesson progress for the authenticated student.

Status transitions are forward-only.  Duplicate calls with the same or a
lower status are accepted and update ``watch_seconds`` without regression.

schema.title: Response Save Progress Api V1 Lessons  Lesson Id  Progress Post

get.description: Return the authenticated student's full progress breakdown for a course.

schema.title: Response Get Course Progress Api V1 Courses  Course Id  Progress Get

get.description: Return the next incomplete lesson for each of the student's active enrollments.

schema.title: Response Get Continue Learning Api V1 Users Me Continue Get

post.description: Create or update the authenticated student's note on a lesson.

get.description: Fetch the authenticated student's note on a lesson.

schema.title: Response Get Note Api V1 Lessons  Lesson Id  Notes Get

delete.description: Delete the authenticated student's note on a lesson.

schema.title: Response Delete Note Api V1 Lessons  Lesson Id  Notes Delete

post.description: Toggle a bookmark on a lesson; creates it if absent, removes it if present.

schema.title: Response Toggle Bookmark Api V1 Lessons  Lesson Id  Bookmark Post

get.description: List all of the authenticated student's bookmarks with lesson and course context.

schema.title: Response List Bookmarks Api V1 Users Me Bookmarks Get

get.description:
Retrieve a single quiz submission belonging to the current student.

Args:
    submission_id: UUID of the submission to retrieve.
    db: Injected async database session.
    current_user: Authenticated student from the JWT.

Returns:
    The ``QuizSubmissionOut`` wrapped in the standard response envelope.

schema.title: Response Get Submission Api V1 Quizzes Submissions  Submission Id  Get

get.description:
Retrieve a quiz with questions (correct answers masked).

Args:
    quiz_id: UUID of the quiz to retrieve.
    db: Injected async database session.
    current_user: Authenticated student from the JWT.

Returns:
    The ``QuizOut`` wrapped in the standard response envelope.

schema.title: Response Get Quiz Api V1 Quizzes  Quiz Id  Get

post.description:
Submit one attempt at a quiz.

Correct answers are revealed in the response when this submission
exhausts the student's remaining attempts.

Args:
    quiz_id: UUID of the quiz to attempt.
    data: The student's answers.
    db: Injected async database session.
    current_user: Authenticated student from the JWT.

Returns:
    A ``QuizSubmissionOut`` with scoring and optionally revealed answers.

schema.title: Response Submit Quiz Api V1 Quizzes  Quiz Id  Submit Post

get.description:
List all submissions made by the current student on a quiz.

Args:
    quiz_id: UUID of the quiz.
    db: Injected async database session.
    current_user: Authenticated student from the JWT.

Returns:
    A list of ``QuizSubmissionOut`` wrapped in the standard response envelope.

schema.title: Response List Submissions Api V1 Quizzes  Quiz Id  Submissions Get

get.description:
Retrieve assignment details.

Args:
    assignment_id: UUID of the assignment to retrieve.
    db: Injected async database session.
    current_user: Authenticated student from the JWT.

Returns:
    The ``AssignmentOut`` wrapped in the standard response envelope.

schema.title: Response Get Assignment Api V1 Assignments  Assignment Id  Get

post.description:
Request a presigned PUT URL for uploading a file to Cloudflare R2.

Creates an ``AssignmentSubmission`` row with ``submitted_at=None`` and
returns a URL the client should PUT the file bytes to directly.  Call
``POST /assignments/submissions/{id}/confirm`` after the upload completes.

Args:
    assignment_id: UUID of the assignment to respond to.
    data: File metadata including name, MIME type, and size.
    db: Injected async database session.
    current_user: Authenticated student from the JWT.

Returns:
    An ``UploadResponseOut`` with the submission ID and presigned URL.

schema.title: Response Request Upload Api V1 Assignments  Assignment Id  Upload Post

post.description:
Confirm that the direct R2 upload is complete.

Stamps ``submitted_at`` on the submission row.  Must be called after the
client successfully PUTs the file to the presigned URL.

Args:
    submission_id: UUID of the ``AssignmentSubmission`` to confirm.
    db: Injected async database session.
    current_user: Authenticated student from the JWT.

Returns:
    The updated ``SubmissionOut`` with ``submitted_at`` populated.

schema.title: Response Confirm Upload Api V1 Assignments Submissions  Submission Id  Confirm Post

get.description:
List all submissions by the current student for an assignment.

Args:
    assignment_id: UUID of the assignment.
    db: Injected async database session.
    current_user: Authenticated student from the JWT.

Returns:
    A list of ``SubmissionOut`` wrapped in the standard response envelope.

schema.title: Response List Submissions Api V1 Assignments  Assignment Id  Submissions Get

get.description:
Return a simple liveness probe response.

Returns:
    A JSON object with ``{"status": "ok"}``.

AssignmentIn.title: AssignmentIn
AssignmentIn.description:
Payload for creating an assignment on a lesson.

Attributes:
    lesson_id: The lesson this assignment is attached to.
    title: Short display name for the assignment.
    instructions: Full assignment brief (may contain Markdown).
    max_file_size_bytes: Upload size limit in bytes (default 10 MiB).
    allowed_extensions: Permitted file extensions without leading dots,
        e.g. ``["pdf", "docx", "zip"]``.

ChapterCreateIn.title: ChapterCreateIn
ChapterCreateIn.description: Payload for creating a new chapter within a course.

ChapterUpdateIn.title: ChapterUpdateIn
ChapterUpdateIn.description: Partial update payload for an existing chapter; ``None`` fields are left unchanged.

CourseCreateIn.title: CourseCreateIn
CourseCreateIn.description: Payload for creating a new course.

CourseUpdateIn.title: CourseUpdateIn
CourseUpdateIn.description: Partial update payload for an existing course; ``None`` fields are left unchanged.

LessonCreateIn.title: LessonCreateIn
LessonCreateIn.description:
Payload for creating a new lesson within a chapter.

The ``validate_type_fields`` validator enforces that video lessons carry a
``video_asset_id`` or ``content`` and that text lessons carry ``content``.

LessonProgressIn.title: LessonProgressIn
LessonProgressIn.description:
Payload for saving or updating lesson progress.

Attributes:
    status: Target progress state; transitions are forward-only.
    watch_seconds: Current video playback position in seconds.

LessonUpdateIn.title: LessonUpdateIn
LessonUpdateIn.description: Partial update payload for an existing lesson; ``None`` fields are left unchanged.

NoteIn.title: NoteIn
NoteIn.description:
Payload for creating or updating a lesson note.

Attributes:
    content: Note body text; must be at least one character.

OptionItem.title: OptionItem
OptionItem.description:
A single selectable option within a quiz question.

Attributes:
    id: Unique identifier for this option within the question.
    text: Display text shown to the student.

QuizIn.title: QuizIn
QuizIn.description:
Payload for creating a quiz on a lesson.

Attributes:
    lesson_id: The lesson this quiz is attached to.
    title: Short display name.
    description: Optional introductory text.
    max_attempts: Maximum submission attempts allowed (default 3).
    time_limit_minutes: Per-attempt time limit; ``None`` means unlimited.
    questions: Ordered list of questions to create with the quiz.

QuizQuestionIn.title: QuizQuestionIn
QuizQuestionIn.description:
Payload for creating a single quiz question.

Attributes:
    position: 1-based display order within the quiz.
    kind: Question type — ``"single_choice"`` or ``"multi_choice"``.
    stem: The question text.
    options: Selectable answer options.
    correct_answers: IDs from ``options`` that constitute a correct response.
    points: Points awarded for a fully correct answer (default 1).

ReorderIn.title: ReorderIn
ReorderIn.description: Payload carrying a complete ordered list of UUIDs for reorder operations.

ResourceCreateIn.title: ResourceCreateIn
ResourceCreateIn.description: Payload for attaching a downloadable resource to a lesson.

Role.title: Role
Role.description: Enumeration of valid user roles stored in the ``users.role`` column.

SubmitQuizIn.title: SubmitQuizIn
SubmitQuizIn.description:
Student's answers for a quiz attempt.

Attributes:
    answers: Maps question UUID strings to lists of selected option IDs.

UploadRequestIn.title: UploadRequestIn
UploadRequestIn.description:
Student's request for a presigned upload URL.

Attributes:
    file_name: Original filename (used as the final segment of the R2 key).
    mime_type: MIME type of the file being uploaded.
    file_size: File size in bytes; validated against ``max_file_size_bytes``.

UserUpdateIn.title: UserUpdateIn
UserUpdateIn.description: Partial update payload for the authenticated user's profile fields.
